# Nestview

> Lightweight, self-hosted Docker container monitoring for homelabbers. Deploy with a single `docker compose up` — no Grafana, no manual config.

## What it is
Nestview is an open-source Docker visibility tool built for people running personal homelab servers (Mac mini, NUC, Raspberry Pi, etc.). It provides a health dashboard, searchable log history, container status, image update detection, and Discord alerting — all from a single compose file with SQLite storage and no external dependencies.

## Who it's for
- Homelabbers who want Docker visibility without deploying a full observability stack
- Indie developers and small teams running lean self-hosted infrastructure
- Users who find Grafana + Prometheus overkill for a personal server
- Anyone replacing manual `docker ps` and `docker logs` with a persistent UI

## Key features
- Zero-config container autodiscovery via Docker socket
- Health dashboard with container status, uptime, CPU%, memory, and network I/O
- Searchable log history persisted in SQLite; log severity coloring; log export
- Network I/O stats with per-container history
- Image update checker — detects when newer images are available on Docker Hub or GHCR
- Discord alerts for image updates and container health changes
- Container and stack-level actions — start, stop, restart, pull & restart from the UI
- Mandatory authentication with setup wizard — bcrypt-hashed credentials, signed httpOnly session cookies
- Multi-arch support: amd64 and arm64 (runs on Apple Silicon, Raspberry Pi, NUC)
- No internet dependency after initial image pull; suitable for air-gapped or firewalled environments
- Fully open source under GPL v3

## How it compares
Nestview fills the gap between "run docker ps manually" and "stand up a full Grafana stack." It is not a replacement for Grafana, Prometheus, or Portainer — it is intentionally simpler. Good fit if you want a single compose file that gives you persistent logs, health status, and update alerts with no additional configuration.

Similar tools in the space: Dozzle (log streaming only), Portainer (full container management), Uptime Kuma (service uptime, not container-native). Nestview focuses specifically on visibility and alerting for Docker Compose-based homelabs.

## Current scope and limitations
- Single-host only (multi-host support is on the roadmap)
- Docker Compose environments; not designed for Kubernetes
- Mandatory authentication — setup wizard on first launch requires a username and password; credentials are bcrypt-hashed and stored locally
- Metrics retention is short-term; not a replacement for long-term time-series storage

## Links
- Website: https://nestview.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/kylejschultz/nestview

## Stack
FastAPI + SQLModel backend, React + TypeScript + Vite frontend, in-process collector threads (stats, logs, events), Docker Compose, SQLite
